tasks.subject: Task 1: Extend DocEvent union with presence events
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the PresenceEntry type and three presence event variants to the event bus so registry, routes, and client share one source of truth.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/events.ts
- Test: tests/unit/events.presence.test.ts (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- PresenceEntry { userId; name; lastSeen } exported from lib/events.ts
- DocEvent includes presence.sync { roster }, presence.updated { entry }, presence.left { userId }
- publish/subscribe unchanged; deliver presence event to same-document subscriber

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/events.presence.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/events.ts", "tests/unit/events.presence.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/events.presence.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PresenceEntry exported from lib/events.ts", "DocEvent includes presence.sync/updated/left", "publish/subscribe deliver presence events"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Presence registry + TTL sweep (lib/presence.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A globalThis-stashed in-memory registry with heartbeat/leave/roster plus env-tunable TTL eviction that publishes presence.left for stale entries.

**Files:**
- Create: lib/presence.ts
- Test: tests/unit/presence.test.ts (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- heartbeat(docId,{userId,name}) upserts, bumps lastSeen, publishes presence.updated
- roster(docId) dedupes by userId
- leave removes + publishes presence.left; absent leave no-op
- evictStale() evicts entries older than PRESENCE_TTL_MS, publishes presence.left; fresh survive
- one globalThis-guarded unref'd setInterval every PRESENCE_SWEEP_MS

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/presence.ts", "tests/unit/presence.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["heartbeat upserts + publishes presence.updated", "roster dedupes by userId", "leave removes + publishes presence.left, no-op when absent", "evictStale evicts stale, keeps fresh", "globalThis-guarded unref'd sweep interval"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Heartbeat POST route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A throttled beacon endpoint that records presence (or departure) for the authenticated participant.

**Files:**
- Create: app/api/documents/[id]/presence/route.ts
- Test: tests/unit/presence.route.test.ts (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- empty body -> heartbeat(id,{userId,name}); 204
- { leaving: true } -> leave(id, userId); 204
- 401 unauth; 404 non-participant
- name falls back to email then 'Someone'

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence.route.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/presence/route.ts", "tests/unit/presence.route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence.route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["empty body heartbeats, returns 204", "leaving:true calls leave, returns 204", "401 unauth, 404 non-participant", "name falls back to email then Someone"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Emit presence.sync snapshot on SSE connect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When a client connects to the document stream, immediately send the current roster.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/api/documents/[id]/stream/route.ts
- Test: tests/unit/stream.presence-sync.test.ts (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- after ': connected', emit one data: line = { type: 'presence.sync', roster: roster(id) }
- no third EventSource
- existing 401/404 gating, forwarding, heartbeat comment unchanged

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/stream.presence-sync.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/stream/route.ts", "tests/unit/stream.presence-sync.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/stream.presence-sync.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["presence.sync snapshot emitted on connect", "no third EventSource", "existing stream behavior unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: PresenceRoster avatar-stack component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Presentational avatar-stack component with +N overflow and (you) marking; logic in pure helpers (unit-tested), rendering covered by Task 7 E2E.

**Files:**
- Create: lib/presence-roster.ts
- Create: components/PresenceRoster.tsx
- Test: tests/unit/presence-roster.test.ts (create)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- initials/colorFor/viewingLabel/orderRoster/displayName correct
- component null on empty; caps at MAX_VISIBLE_AVATARS=4 with +N
- data-testid presence-roster + aria-label; per-avatar presence-avatar + data-user-name

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence-roster.test.ts && CI=true pnpm lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/presence-roster.ts", "components/PresenceRoster.tsx", "tests/unit/presence-roster.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence-roster.test.ts && CI=true pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helpers correct", "component null on empty, caps at 4 with +N", "presence-roster + presence-avatar testids and data-user-name"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Presence reducer + wire DocumentView and page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure client reducer, optimistic self-seed, heartbeats, render PresenceRoster, pass identity from server page.

**Files:**
- Create: lib/presence-client.ts
- Test: tests/unit/presence-client.test.ts (create)
- Modify: components/DocumentView.tsx
- Modify: app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- applyPresenceEvent pure: sync replaces (re-adds self if missing), updated upserts, left removes, others unchanged
- DocumentView accepts currentUserId/currentUserName, seeds roster, renders <PresenceRoster> in header
- presence events handled on existing EventSource switch; no new EventSource
- heartbeat on mount + every NEXT_PUBLIC_PRESENCE_HEARTBEAT_MS (10000); { leaving:true } sendBeacon on pagehide+unmount
- page passes currentUserId + currentUserName (name->email->'You')

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence-client.test.ts && CI=true pnpm lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/presence-client.ts", "tests/unit/presence-client.test.ts", "components/DocumentView.tsx", "app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/presence-client.test.ts && CI=true pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["applyPresenceEvent pure reducer correct", "DocumentView seeds self + renders PresenceRoster", "presence events on existing EventSource, no third", "heartbeat mount+interval, sendBeacon leave", "page passes identity props"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Two-context Playwright E2E
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the roster works across two logged-in browsers and the tab holds only two EventSource connections.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/e2e/presence.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- two contexts (A creates doc; B opens URL via link-grant) each show 2 people, both names
- after B closes, A drops to 1 within TTL
- exactly 2 EventSource constructions in a viewing context, no third

**Verify:** lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; CI=true PRESENCE_TTL_MS=3000 PRESENCE_SWEEP_MS=1000 pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/presence.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/presence.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; CI=true PRESENCE_TTL_MS=3000 PRESENCE_SWEEP_MS=1000 pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/presence.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both contexts show 2 people with both names", "A drops to 1 after B closes within TTL", "exactly 2 EventSource constructions"]}
```
